message:
fix: check active_mr before SAFE_TO_NUKE and sort mail by priority

check-recovery returned SAFE_TO_NUKE when cleanup_status was clean but
an active MR was still pending merge, risking loss of the MR reference.
Now requires ActiveMR == "" before declaring safe.

Mail inbox/search results now sort by priority first (urgent > high >
normal > low), then by timestamp within each priority tier. Handoff
messages elevated from normal to high priority so they float above
regular mail in the inbox.

Fixes GHI #1035, GHI #584.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1095,7 +1095,7 @@ func sendHandoffMail(subject, message string) (string, error) {
 		"create",
 		"--assignee", agentID,
 		"-d", message,
-		"--priority", "2",
+		"--priority", "1", // high — handoffs should float above normal mail
 		"--labels", labels + ",gt:message",
 		"--actor", agentID,
 		"--ephemeral", // Handoff mail is ephemeral
